message:
Running command: # Excellent! Huge progress! Steps 37-44 completed rapidly!
# Now at step 44 OpenROAD.RCX (RC parasitic extraction - SPEF)
# Let's monitor progress
sleep 180
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log
echo "---Steps---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -10
